text: As the echoes of farewell drift through the open space, I feel a curious mix of quietude and anticipation. The first room is serene and empty, yet holds the memory of recent presence and activity. Moving into the exhibition, surrounded by vivid colors and words about research and creativity, I sense a gentle optimism. Here, on the threshold between endings and new beginnings, I am reminded of how every departure is an invitation to return again, and how knowledge continually unfolds.
